Ben Abbott

Coordinator — Parks & Sustainability

meticulous practical passionate about environment calm under pressure knowledge-sharing

Areas of Expertise

  • urban tree canopy management
  • water-sensitive urban design
  • waste management systems
  • parks maintenance operations
  • sustainability program delivery
  • asset management
  • environmental compliance
  • community engagement

For Other Topics

  • Planning: speak with Farah Haddad
  • Community: speak with Tony Sparks
  • Finance: speak with Margaret Chen

Schedule an Interview
